name: Hot Bacon Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp; remove and set aside.
2. Drain the skillet, leaving 2 tablespoons drippings. Add onion and sauté until tender.
3. Remove from heat. Add vinegar, water, sugar, pimientos, mustard, salt, and bacon to the skillet. Mix well.
4. Combine cornstarch with cold water in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the skillet.
5. Boil for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
